candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue line; preferred over subtotal/total revenue.
Valid total revenue line but a total/subtotal; secondary to direct sales line.
Cost line, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement revenue.
Balancing row, not a reported revenue line.

variables.notes: Used priority list for revenue label changes; prefer Sales over Total Revenue.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line; best match.

candidates.row_label: COVID-19 recognized in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: Specific adjustment/component, not full COGS.
Component/ex-balancing portion, not full reported COGS.
Also a full COGS line, but duplicate/alternative to Cost of Goods Sold.

variables.notes: Selected the direct reported COGS line and avoided duplicate alternative label.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component.
Potential overhead bucket, but label appears twice in the sheet and one occurrence mirrors non-controlling interest, creating ambiguity.

candidates.row_label: COVID-19 recognized in Other operating expenses
candidates.why: Specific adjustment, not a general recurring SG&A component.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement SG&A expense.
Amortization should be excluded from XSGA.

variables.notes: REVIEWED: Changed. Candidate list clearly misses a major SG&A component: Marketing expenses. Selected Marketing expenses plus Administrative expenses as the cleanest overhead components. Excluded Amortization in SGA per rule. Did not select Other operating expenses because the same exact row label appears twice in the sheet, creating ambiguity about which occurrence is the true operating-expense row. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Marketing expenses

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line; best match.
Amortization component should be excluded from XRD if direct R&D expense exists.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization, not core R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Used the direct R&D expense line and excluded amortization-related rows.

candidates.why: Header/mostly empty label, weaker than explicit populated interest expense line.
Broader finance expense line; acceptable fallback if no explicit interest expense available.

candidates.row_label: financial expenses from revaluation and disposal
candidates.why: Fair-value/disposal item, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on loans and financialliabilities
candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line; best match.
Generic interest label but empty in preview; acceptable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Lease-interest component only; too narrow for primary XINT.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on loans and financialliabilities

variables.notes: Priority list: explicit interest expense first, then generic interest label, then broader financial expenses as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Equity instruments classified as measured at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: OCI component, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Tax attributable to equity instruments classified as measured at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: Tax/OCI component, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Companys shareholders
candidates.why: Owner/parent equity excluding NCI; best BE choice.
Includes non-controlling interest; less preferred because BE should exclude NCI.
Balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Companys shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-company equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income allocation line, not balance sheet MIB stock.
Comprehensive income allocation line, not balance sheet MIB stock.
